data.title: Imaria
data.title_japanese: いまりあ
data.synopsis: The talents of the young beauties Honami Aihara and Seika Yumenoki are blessed by nature itself, so the girls have a certain popularity. Both of them dream of becoming real idols and dream of a strong and faithful relationship with their beloved boyfriend. But having become involved in the adult modeling business, they will feel for themselves that the first is often incompatible with the second.

titles.title: Shounen ga Otona ni Natta Natsu
少年が大人になった夏

data.title: Shounen ga Otona ni Natta Natsu
data.title_japanese: 少年が大人になった夏
data.synopsis:
Ryuuki Kirishima is a boy who lives with his older sister, Reiko, after the tragic death of their parents in a car accident. One summer day, Ryuuki and his friends gather to watch adult videos for fun. Although Ryuuki doesn't usually enjoy this type of content, he feels inexplicably attracted to videos featuring Kiriru, a new and popular porn actress.

As he watches, Ryuuki feels a strong attraction to Kiriru, and to his surprise, she appears before him in person.

(Source: TMDB)

titles.title: Isekai Mokushiroku Mynoghra: Hametsu no Bunmei de Hajimeru Sekai Seifuku
異世界黙示録マイノグーラ ～破滅の文明で始める世界征服～
Apocalypse Bringer Mynoghra: World Conquest Starts with the Civilization of Ruin

data.title: Isekai Mokushiroku Mynoghra: Hametsu no Bunmei de Hajimeru Sekai Seifuku
data.title_english: Apocalypse Bringer Mynoghra: World Conquest Starts with the Civilization of Ruin
data.title_japanese: 異世界黙示録マイノグーラ ～破滅の文明で始める世界征服～
data.synopsis:
Takuto Ira spent his short life confined to a hospital bed, with the civilization-building game Eternal Nations as his only form of entertainment. His favorite faction within the game—Mynoghra—was infamously complex to navigate and skewed toward evil; moreover, he insisted on playing at the highest difficulty.

After his untimely death, Takuto awakens in a world uncannily reminiscent of Eternal Nations. He is reincarnated as the King of Ruin, sovereign of Mynoghra itself. At his side stands Odei no Atou, the default hero unit of his chosen nation. Remembering every battle they fought together, she pledges unwavering loyalty to Takuto once more.

As Takuto begins to build Mynoghra from scratch in this new world, his early-game strategy remains unchanged: lie low, avoid war, and ensure survival at all costs—ironic for an evil ruler meant to conquer the world. When he offers refuge to persecuted Dark Elves fleeing destruction, a fledgling empire born of a darkness the world has yet to understand begins to take shape.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Class no Daikirai na Joshi to Kekkon suru Koto ni Natta.
I Got Married to the Girl I Hate Most in Class
クラスの大嫌いな女子と結婚することになった。
I'm Getting Married to a Girl I Hate in My Class

data.title: Class no Daikirai na Joshi to Kekkon suru Koto ni Natta.
data.title_english: I'm Getting Married to a Girl I Hate in My Class
data.title_japanese: クラスの大嫌いな女子と結婚することになった。
title_synonyms: I Got Married to the Girl I Hate Most in Class
data.synopsis:
There is only one person that high school student Saito Houjou truly cannot stand—and that is his temperamental classmate, Akane Sakuramori. The two have always been on bad terms; their contrasting views and personalities only lead to endless fighting. However, everything changes when Saito's grandfather and Akane's grandmother arrange a sudden meeting and insist that the two get married!

Walking down the aisle is the last thing Saito and Akane want, but they are quickly coerced into accepting the ridiculous plan and soon move into a shared house as husband and wife. Although Saito and Akane despise each other, navigating life together under the same roof may just turn their bitter hatred into everlasting love.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Tasokare Hotel
data.title_japanese: 誰ソ彼ホテル
data.synopsis:
Situated within an endless twilight, the Tasogare Hotel welcomes anyone stuck between life and death. Unaware of their fate, guests must regain lost memories through mementos hidden in their designated hotel room. Most guests pass on or return to the world of living within days, while few others find themselves staying at the hotel for much longer than usual.

Neko Tsukahara, a young woman with an expressionless face, finds herself at this hotel. As she is guided along by the staff, Neko regains enough of her memories to become invested in the plights of the other guests. Solving the guests' affairs and the mystery behind the hotel turns out to be too interesting of a situation to pass up; Neko decides that simply being a guest is not enough to satisfy her curiosity.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Tasokare Hotel was released on Blu-ray in four volumes from April 25, 2025, to July 25, 2025. Each episode was streamed five days in advance of the TV broadcast starting on January 3, 2025, on Abema. Regular broadcasting began on January 8, 2025.

titles.title: Fuguushoku "Kanteishi" ga Jitsu wa Saikyou Datta
The Unfavorable Job "Appraiser" Is Actually the Strongest
不遇職【鑑定士】が実は最強だった
Even Given the Worthless "Appraiser" Class, I’m Actually the Strongest

data.title: Fuguushoku "Kanteishi" ga Jitsu wa Saikyou Datta
data.title_english: Even Given the Worthless "Appraiser" Class, I’m Actually the Strongest
data.title_japanese: 不遇職【鑑定士】が実は最強だった
title_synonyms: The Unfavorable Job "Appraiser" Is Actually the Strongest
data.synopsis:
In a world where strong classes are preferred, Ein has always been treated with disdain due to his mere Appraiser job, which allows him to appraise anything. During a dungeon expedition—where Ein usually only watches from the sidelines—a dangerous enemy appears, and Ein's allies use him as bait to escape the dire situation.

Prepared to die, Ein falls into the abyss, where he is miraculously saved by Yuri, the spirit of the long-lost World Tree, and Ursula, her fierce guardian. The two utilize their marvelous abilities to heal Ein's grave injuries and bestow him with the prosthetic "Spirit Eye," which lets him predict his opponents' moves and receive an infinite number of skills.

To help Ein leave the dungeon depths, Ursula decides to train him. After weeks of hard training, Ein's body is enchanted even further, and he takes Yuri and Ursula back to the surface with him. As the trio begins their journey together, Ein aims to reunite Yuri with her family and become a hero who will never be forgotten.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Ranma ½ (2024)
data.title_japanese: らんま1/2
data.synopsis:
During their martial arts training expedition in China, Ranma Saotome and his father Genma suffered an accident, which in turn, afflicted them with a curse—whenever they are doused with cold water, Ranma transforms into a girl, while his father turns into a panda! Only hot water can reverse these changes, but any further contact with cold water opens the can of worms once more.

Unfortunately, the trouble does not end there, as Ranma finds out about his betrothal to one of the daughters of Soun Tendou, his father's closest friend. During the families' first meeting, it is decided that Ranma is to be married to Akane, the youngest daughter, a decision that is met with vehement protests from both sides. The two are simply not compatible, yet they are forced to live under one roof. Ranma's status quo further adds to the chaos, leading him to a series of comedic situations and misunderstandings that, in the grand scheme of things, may just be what he needs to work with Akane.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman Movie: Baikinman to Ehon no Lulun
えいがそれいけ! アンパンマン ばいきんまんとえほんのルルン

data.title: Sore Ike! Anpanman Movie: Baikinman to Ehon no Lulun
data.title_japanese: えいがそれいけ! アンパンマン ばいきんまんとえほんのルルン
data.synopsis:
One day, Baikinman finds a picture book. He hears a voice from the book saying, "Baikinman, warrior of love and courage, come and save me!" and is sucked into the book. He meets Lulun, a forest fairy, in a large forest beyond the desert. Lulun is scared and can't muster up her courage, so she asks Baikinman to defeat the "Sucking Elephant" that is rampaging through the forest. Although she is reluctant at first, Lulun is inspired by Baikinman's refusal to give up and stand up to her. However, she has a hard time with the strength of the Sucking Elephant! In a desperate situation, Baikinman tells Lulun, "Call Anpanman!" Anpanman and Baikinman join forces and do great things! 

(Source: Official Site, translated)

titles.title: Mirai no Kuromaku-kei Akuyaku Reijou Moriarty no Isekai Kanzen Hanzai Hakusho
未来の黒幕系悪役令嬢モリアーティーの異世界完全犯罪白書

data.title: Mirai no Kuromaku-kei Akuyaku Reijou Moriarty no Isekai Kanzen Hanzai Hakusho
data.title_japanese: 未来の黒幕系悪役令嬢モリアーティーの異世界完全犯罪白書
data.synopsis:
After suffering a crushing defeat against a legendary detective, James Moriarty is reincarnated as a ghost in another world. He wakes up in the body of Sherry Moriarty—a severely bullied student from the elitist All Blue Academy—and manages to save the young woman, who was attempting to take her own life.

Although James has forgotten his name and past, he has retained his criminal expertise and is determined to help Sherry get revenge against Porgrette Whey Cochon and the other noblewomen who have made Sherry's existence miserable. The bullies of All Blue Academy will learn the hard way that when two Moriartys unite to commit the perfect crime, no one can stand in their way.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Wu Liuqi: Jiyi Suipian
data.title_japanese: 伍六七之记忆碎片
data.synopsis:
In order to find his cherished partner, Wu Liuqi returns to Xuanwu Country and faces those forgotten fragments of memory. The dusty truth brings pain and anger, but now he is no longer alone. What is the purpose of having power? This time, Wu Liuqi has to make a new choice for his life...

(Source: Official Site)
